compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/home/ubuntu/pp-kitchen/serverless.yml.serviceRawFile:
service: pp-kitchen

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.12
  region: us-east-1
  iam:
    role: arn:aws:iam::${aws:accountId}:role/LabRole
  environment:
    TASKS_TABLE: pp-tasks
    EVENT_BUS_NAME: ${ssm:/pp/eventBusName}

plugins:
  - serverless-step-functions

custom:
  stateMachineName: pp-kitchen-sm

functions:

  registrar:
    handler: functions/registrar.handler

  completar:
    handler: functions/completar.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: tasks/completar
          method: post
          cors: true

  listarPendientes:
    handler: functions/listar_pendientes.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: tasks/pendientes
          method: get
          cors: true

  emitirStepCompleted:
    handler: functions/emitir_step_completed.handler

  iniciarWorkflow:
    handler: functions/iniciar_workflow.handler
    environment:
      STATE_MACHINE_ARN: !Sub "arn:aws:states:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stateMachine:pp-kitchen-sm"

stepFunctions:
  stateMachines:
    kitchenWorkflow:
      name: ${self:custom.stateMachineName}
      role: arn:aws:iam::${aws:accountId}:role/LabRole
      definition: ${file(./state-machine.asl.json)}

resources:
  Resources:

    TasksTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: pp-tasks
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: orderId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: estado
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: orderId
            KeyType: HASH
          - AttributeName: estado
            KeyType: RANGE

    KitchenSMParam:
      Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
      Properties:
        Name: /pp/kitchen-sm-arn
        Type: String
        Value: !Sub "arn:aws:states:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stateMachine:pp-kitchen-sm"

    OrderCreatedRule:
      Type: AWS::Events::Rule
      Properties:
        Name: pp-kitchen-order-created-rule
        EventBusName: pp-bus
        EventPattern:
          source:
            - pp.orders
          detail-type:
            - order.created
        State: ENABLED
        Targets:
          - Id: IniciarWorkflowTarget
            Arn: !GetAtt IniciarWorkflowLambdaFunction.Arn

    OrderCreatedRulePermission:
      Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
      Properties:
        FunctionName: !GetAtt IniciarWorkflowLambdaFunction.Arn
        Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
        Principal: events.amazonaws.com
        SourceArn: !GetAtt OrderCreatedRule.Arn

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
